svg.title: Synalux POS — laUel printer
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for laUel printer. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Print price labels, shelf tags, inventory barcodes, and item stickers
Auto-print label when new item added
Print receiving label on PO receipt scan
⚠ Price changes require new shelf tag
Estimate: 248 labels → approx. 4 min print time
BarcodeBridge.swift handles label print jobs via WKWebView bridge. Label data from pos_menu_items + pos_inventory.
Print job queue: pos_label_print_queue (status: pending / sent / done / error).
Prep labels auto-generated from KDS when item fires. PDF417 on prep labels encodes: item_id, batch_date,
Price change → auto-reprint trigger via pos_menu_items updated_at webhook.
Print commands via ESC/POS or ZPL depending on printer driver.
BarcodeBridge calls window.labelPrint(jobJSON) → native handler queues to connected printer.
